questions: For the selection ring bug: is the ring disappearing *immediately* on hover, or does it flash briefly then disappear? And does it disappear for all items or only certain ones (e.g., videos vs images, items in certain grid positions)?

For AgentChat in locked pane: should the chat panel appear at the same bottom-right viewport position as it does on the full editor page, or should it be positioned relative to the visible pane area (e.g., inset from the pane's right edge)?
Are there any edge function deployments or migration freezes I should be aware of before touching the ai-timeline-agent functions?
For the useExternalDrop decomposition: should the extracted handlers remain in the same file or be split into a separate `handlers/` directory? (I'm assuming same file to minimize churn.)

success_criteria.criterion: Selection ring (ring-2 ring-sky-400) appears instantly and persistently on selected gallery items — no flicker on hover, no disappearance after click
All 5 existing test files pass without modification to test expectations (unless test was wrong)
AgentChat bubble and panel are visible and functional when editor pane is in locked/pinned state
Multi-drag from gallery to timeline continues working (drag preview, drop handling, track creation)
Edge function changes are backward-compatible — no breaking changes to session schema or tool call format
dragDrop.test.ts (24 tests) all pass after refactoring
No duplicated isRecord/asTrimmedString/asPositiveNumber across server-side edge function files
useExternalDrop.ts onTimelineDrop handler reduced from ~297 lines to a dispatcher under 50 lines
loop.ts runAgentLoop function reduced from 213 lines to under 100 lines of orchestration
command-parser.ts parseCommand uses dispatch map instead of 15 if-branches
AgentChat.tsx component body under ~200 lines after extracting sub-components and hook
No function exceeds 5 levels of nesting after refactoring
useExternalDrop track creation logic appears once (shared helper), not 3 times
AgentChat works correctly in full editor page, unlocked pane, and locked pane (manual smoke test)
Lasso selection, modifier-click toggle, and single-click selection all work in gallery (manual smoke test)

assumptions: The selection ring CSS issue is primarily caused by `transition-all` transitioning the box-shadow property (which includes both ring and shadow), not by a state management bug in GallerySelectionContext. Will verify state stability in Step 2 but leading with the CSS fix.

Client-side (useAgentSession.ts) and server-side (messages.ts/generation.ts) validation utilities cannot share code directly due to different runtimes (browser vs Deno). Server-side dedup is the priority; client-side duplication is acceptable.
useExternalDrop handler extraction stays in the same file to minimize import churn and keep the hook's dependency closure simple.
The AgentChat portal approach (createPortal to document.body) is preferred over moving AgentChat rendering up the component tree, since it's less invasive and React portals preserve context.
The `transform` class on EditorPaneTab (line 148) is intentional for the sliding animation and should not be removed — the fix must work around it.
No active agent sessions will be affected by edge function refactoring since we're only restructuring internal code, not changing the function interface or session schema.
structure_warnings: Each step section should reference at least one file in backticks.
